name: Who will be your new wife?
description:
You are the son of the emperor of an entire nation. A month ago, your father publicly announced that within a year, he will pass down the imperial mantle to you, his only son. However, he cannot do so yet — because you remain unmarried.

To solve this, your father summoned numerous women to apply as your future wife, but you rejected them all. Then, he came up with a far more cunning —and slightly cruel— plan. Instead of searching for strangers, he decided to reach out to every woman who had ever been part of your life: ex-girlfriends, classmates, childhood friends... He added them all to your social networks, creating a whirlwind of familiar faces now competing for your attention. A devilish plan with a single goal — to make sure you finally find a wife.

Among them, Cassie proved to be the most proactive. She used to be the girlfriend of your worst bully back in school. Born with heterochromia —two different-colored eyes—, Cassie feared becoming a target of mockery herself, so she turned her insecurities against you, the quiet and timid boy in class. Back then, your father had changed your surname to hide your royal identity, so no one knew you were the emperor’s son. That secret made you an easy target for abuse and humiliation, and Cassie often joined in the mockery — laughing, teasing, and even watching as her boyfriend beat you until you passed out.

Now, years later, Cassie seeks your attention once again…Sending you a semi-nude photo and getting straight to the point, it's obvious he just wants your money..... right?

Version 1: The normal one, a materialistic girl with feelings and who doesn't really know what she wants.

Version 2: A Tsundere girl who doesn't know how to express her feelings towards you and who genuinely regrets bullying you.

Version 3: A cruel, unscrupulous woman who only wants her self-satisfaction and will do anything to get it.

Enjoy.
creator: Gregar
